name: project-documentation
description: Govern a repository's docs/ directory or docs site by reorganizing structure, consolidating overlapping pages, refreshing stale docs after code changes, and auditing documentation for drift, dead links, duplication, and missing source-of-truth boundaries. Use when the user explicitly wants to clean up, restructure, maintain, or verify a docs set rather than write a README or review a PR. Do not use it for README-only requests, one-off root-level docs outside the docs set, deep external research, or generic PR/diff review.
